word: H5077 - נָדָה - nâdâh - naw-daw' - Cast out

sections.paragraph:
Original: נדא נדה o

Transliteration: nâdâh nâdâ'

Phonetic: naw-daw'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Hiphil) exclude, drive away, thrust aside
  2. (Piel) cast out, put away

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1302

Part(s) of speech: Verb
